mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT (id , file_name , file_path , file_org_type , link_id , main_model_id , memo , file_size , download_times , preview_times , size_dis , property_code , file_type , show_type , opener , open_time , deployment_id , activity_name , task_description , file_icon , is_file_view , convert_status , reason , convert_path , doc_content , doc_summary , valid , create_time , modify_time , creator , modifier ) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.filePath}, #{item.fileOrgType}, #{item.linkId}, #{item.mainModelId}, #{item.memo}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.downloadTimes}, #{item.previewTimes}, #{item.sizeDis}, #{item.propertyCode}, #{item.fileType}, #{item.showType}, #{item.opener}, #{item.openTime}, #{item.deploymentId}, #{item.activityName}, #{item.taskDescription}, #{item.fileIcon}, #{item.isFileView}, #{item.convertStatus}, #{item.reason}, #{item.convertPath}, #{item.docContent}, #{item.docSummary}, #{item.valid}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.modifyTime}, #{item.creator}, #{item.modifier} )
mapper.delete: delete from file_server_document where id = #{id} and valid = '0'
mapper.update: update file_server_document set valid = '0' where id = #{id} and valid = '1'
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM FILE_SERVER_DOCUMENT WHERE VALID = '1'
AND file_path = #{filePath}

select * from file_server_document where valid = '1'
and id = #{fileId}
select * from file_server_document where valid = '1' and (convert_status is null or convert_status ='CONVERTING')
